stemHtml: Which combination of bank and slip gives the lowest V<sub>MC</sub>?

options.a: 5º bank into the live engine and ½ ball out to the live engine.
options.b: 5º bank into the dead engine and ½ ball out to the live engine.
options.c: 5º bank into the dead engine and ½ ball out to the dead engine.
options.d: 5º bank into the live engine and ½ ball out to the dead engine.
